biography: From the fairways of Espoo Ringside Golf, Tomas has been a steadfast presence in the Hector Trophée, having participated in three previous editions of this distinguished pair competition.

While the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair, and the individual Victor Trophy, have remained just beyond his grasp, Tomas's commitment to the contest has never wavered. His approach to the game is often characterized by a measured composure and an unwavering competitive spirit, qualities that have always added a valuable dimension to the tournament's dynamics.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Tomas will not be among the field of competitors, as he is now considered to have retired from active participation in Hector events. Nevertheless, his contributions to the tournament's history, marked by his consistent efforts and sportsmanship over his three appearances, are a testament to the enduring appeal and spirit of the competition.
